zh.title: 萨罗夫的塞拉芬预言全集 - 俄罗斯东正教圣人的末世预言与验证 | Seraphim of Sarov Prophecies
zh.description: 俄罗斯东正教最受尊崇的圣人之一萨罗夫的塞拉芬（1754/1759-1833）关于俄罗斯未来命运、革命苦难、敌基督降临、俄罗斯复兴的预言完整收录与验证。

en.title: Seraphim of Sarov Prophecies - Russian Orthodox Saint's Visions of Russia's Destiny | Full Archive & Verification
en.description: Complete collection of prophecies by Seraphim of Sarov (1754/1759-1833), one of the most venerated saints in Russian Orthodoxy. Predictions about Russia's suffering, revolution, the Antichrist, and spiritual resurrection.
en.keywords: Seraphim of Sarov,Russian prophecy,Orthodox saint,Russia destiny,Antichrist,end times,Holy Spirit,Sarov monastery,Russian Orthodox prophecy

en.twitterDescription: Prophecies of Seraphim of Sarov: Russia's suffering, revolution, faith restoration, end times. With historical verification.
